title: Public Transit GTFS Static Feeds

official_entrypoints.label: Transit agency developer or open data feed page

supported_inputs.need_text: Transit schedule, stops, routes, trips, or service calendar need
supported_inputs.feed_url: Optional official GTFS static feed URL

verification_hints: A GTFS static feed is usually a zip file, but the zip URL is not final evidence.
Future validation requires stops.txt, routes.txt, and trips.txt inside the GTFS zip.
Calendar, calendar_dates, stop_times, and shapes may be required depending on the need.
Do not use this card as benchmark-case answer data.

need_terms: live vehicle telemetry without a GTFS endpoint

access_notes: GTFS Schedule is a public file-format standard; actual feed access depends on each transit agency's published feed URL and terms.
MTA and King County Metro legacy known_source entries remain compatibility hints only.
A feed URL or agency page is not sufficient until GTFS zip contents are validated.
future_verification_hints: Confirm agency identity, feed freshness, feed zip validity, and required tables.
Route-agent consumers must run resolver/probe/download/verifier separately.
migration_note: Legacy GTFS known-source entries should migrate to SourceCard metadata and source-specific scripts that emit not-final feed leads.
